summary: The notarization-and-release-promotion phase is validated on phase/notarization-and-release-promotion. The repo now notarizes the signed macOS bundle with Apple, staples the accepted ticket, records a Gatekeeper-accepted result, and promotes the notarized release into the stable channel with manifest and checksum artifacts.
next_steps: Execute multi-surface-regression-hardening to reduce the intentional browser/native transport drift risk.
Execute release-credential-portability-hardening so notarization and promotion can run without a machine-local keychain profile.
Reduce local desktop sandbox friction for localhost SSH fixtures in the dedicated remediation phase.
blockers: Release automation still depends on a machine-local `notarytool` keychain profile.
Local macOS localhost SSH fixture suites still require an unsandboxed shell for valid results.
